title: Moosend vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Moosend vs Sendinblue. See pricing, features, and find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
h1: Moosend vs Sendinblue: Complete Comparison Guide
intro: Both Moosend and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are popular freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Moosend excels at unlimited email campaigns with powerful automation, while Sendinblue focuses on omnichannel communication including SMS, WhatsApp, and transactional email. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right tool for your business.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small businesses with large email volumes

choose_a_if: You need unlimited emails at the lowest possible cost
You're a small business focused primarily on email marketing
You want advanced automation workflows and landing pages
choose_b_if: You need SMS and WhatsApp messaging alongside email
You require transactional email API capabilities
You want an all-in-one CRM platform with marketing automation

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. Moosend wins for budget-conscious email-only campaigns with unlimited sends, while Sendinblue excels if you need omnichannel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp) or transactional email capabilities. Sendinblue's free tier is significantly more generous with 100,000 subscribers vs. Moosend's 1,000.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Moosend is cheaper at $9/month compared to Sendinblue's $25/month. However, Sendinblue's free tier supports 100,000 subscribers (vs. 1,000 on Moosend), making it more cost-effective for growing businesses that don't need paid features yet. Compare your subscriber count and feature needs to determine the true cost.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support list imports and exports, making migration straightforward. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your contacts and import them into another platform. However, you'll need to recreate automation workflows and email templates, as these typically don't transfer between platforms.
